summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact reports all 16 targets are open pull requests with hydrated updated_at values and no security-sensitive items. This shard has no shared canonical and low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled, so each PR is classified conservatively as an independent open PR for normal maintainer review rather than closure or merge.
